Title: Send Push Notifications
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification management page.
2. Click on the "Push Notification" option.
3. Click on the "Send Push Notifications" button.
Expected Result: Push notifications should be sent to all subscribed users.

Title: Send In-App Notifications
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification management page.
2. Click on the "In App Notification" option.
3. Click on the "Send In-App Notifications" button.
Expected Result: In-app notifications should be sent to all subscribed users.

Title: Enable Both Push and In-App Notifications
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification settings page.
2. Enable both "Push Notification" and "In App Notification".
3. Save the settings.
Expected Result: Both push and in-app notifications should be enabled for the user.

Title: Disable Push Notifications Only
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification settings page.
2. Disable "Push Notification".
3. Save the settings.
Expected Result: Push notifications should be disabled while in-app notifications remain enabled for the user.

Title: Disable In-App Notifications Only
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification settings page.
2. Disable "In App Notification".
3. Save the settings.
Expected Result: In-app notifications should be disabled while push notifications remain enabled for the user.

Title: Disable Both Notifications
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification settings page.
2. Disable both "Push Notification" and "In App Notification".
3. Save the settings.
Expected Result: Both push and in-app notifications should be disabled for the user.

Title: Re-enable Both Notifications
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification settings page.
2. Re-enable both "Push Notification" and "In App Notification".
3. Save the settings.
Expected Result: Both push and in-app notifications should be re-enabled for the user.

Title: Re-enable Push Notifications Only
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification settings page.
2. Re-enable "Push Notification".
3. Save the settings.
Expected Result: Push notifications should be re-enabled
